ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_info" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Vehicle manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Vehicle model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vehicle's owner */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fleet the vehicle belongs to */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device installed in the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_info_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_info ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_info_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleet_info ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_info_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owner_info ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owner_info" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Owner's name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Owner's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Owner's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Owner's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_info" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Fleet name */,
  "fleet_type" TEXT /* Fleet type (e.g., commercial, personal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Fleet description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_info" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., GPS, OBD-II) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Device model */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the vehicle_id in vehicle_info table */,
  "timer" REAL /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "pos" TEXT /* Vehicle position as a tuple (x, y, z) */,
  "dir" TEXT /* Vehicle direction as a tuple (x, y, z) */,
  "vel" TEXT /* Vehicle velocity as a tuple (x, y, z) */,
  "steering" INTEGER /* Current steering angle */,
  "steering_input" REAL /* Steering input value */,
  "brake" INTEGER /* Current brake pressure */,
  "brake_input" REAL /* Brake input value */,
  "throttle" INTEGER /* Current throttle position */,
  "throttle_input" REAL /* Throttle input value */,
  "wheelspeed" REAL /* Current wheel speed */,
  "vel_kmh" REAL /* Vehicle velocity in kilometers per hour */,
  "is_oob" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the vehicle is out of bounds */,
  "oob_counter" INTEGER /* Count of out-of-bound occurrences */,
  "max_oob_percentage" INTEGER /* Maximum percentage of time spent out of bounds */,
  "oob_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled while out of bounds */,
  "course" REAL /* Vehicle course */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Vehicle altitude */,
  "engine_rpm" INTEGER /* Engine RPM */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Fuel level */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the driver_id in driver_info table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicle_info ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_data_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES driver_info ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_info" (
  "driver_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Driver's name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Driver's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Driver's phone number */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Driver's experience in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the vehicle_id in vehicle_info table */,
  "timer" REAL /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., speed, braking, acceleration) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicle_info ("vehicle_id")
)
